name: io.github.codespar/mcp-clearsale
description: MCP server for ClearSale — Brazilian fraud prevention, order risk scoring, device fingerprinting, and chargeback feedback

environmentVariables.name: CLEARSALE_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: ClearSale API key / bearer token used in the Authorization header

environmentVariables.name: CLEARSALE_BASE_URL
environmentVariables.description: ClearSale API base URL. Defaults to https://api.clearsale.com.br (prod). Override per contract-issued staging URL.
